name: postcrossing-mock
description: Root workspace for PostCrossing mock backend, simple web UI, and Firefox extension.

scripts.bootstrap: npm install -w server || npm --prefix server install
scripts.demo:
npm run seed && echo '
🚀 Starting PostCrossing Mock...
📱 Web Interface: http://localhost:4000
🔍 API Health: http://localhost:4000/api/meta/health

👥 Test Users: alice, bruno, cami, dave

Press Ctrl+C to stop
' && npm run dev
